name: compliance closed-loop step audit-log-to-checkpoint signs the merkle checkpoint over the new entries
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && printf '{"event":"e1"}\n' > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step audit-to-checkpoint --audit-log compliance/audit.log --checkpoint-dir compliance/audit-checkpoints --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
